highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Assumption College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Assumption College?
faqs.answer: Assumption College offers Degree courses including 17 UG and 7 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Seats intake availability for these courses at Assumption College goes up to 754.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Assumption College for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Assumption College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
BBA Candidates completed 10+2 from any recognized board are eligible to apply.
B.A. Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognized school/board.
B.Com Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognized school/board.
B.Sc. Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognized school/board.
BCA Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognized school/board.
M.A. Candidates completed graduation/bachelor's degree from any recognized institute/university are eligible to apply.

faqs.question: Is Assumption College a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Assumption College is a reputed institute for M.Sc., MSW, M.Com, BBA, B.A., B.Com, B.Sc., BCA, M.A.. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies, Humanities & Social Sciences, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Science. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Assumption College has a review rating of 3.9 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: What specializations do Assumption College offer in their courses?
faqs.answer: Assumption College is a good institution for M.Sc, MSW, M.Com, M.A, BBA, B.A, B.Com, B.Sc, BCA courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Assumption College are Textile Management, English, Food & Nutrition, Mathematics, Computer Science, Physics, Chemistry, Botany.

placements.overview:
UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 676 students were admitted at Assumption College and 548 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 548 students 60 were placed with median salary of INR 222972 and 368 students opted for higher studies. A total of 648 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at Assumption Collegeand 524 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 524 students 169 were placed with median salary of INR 257500 and 343 students opted for higher studies.

PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 121 students were admitted at Assumption College and 111 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 111 students 13 were placed with median salary of INR 210000 and 6 students opted for higher studies. A total of 148 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Assumption Collegeand 140 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 140 students 74 were placed with median salary of INR 225000 and 24 students opted for higher studies.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Assumption College offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. College offers B.Sc., BCA and B.Com courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Sc., M.Com and M.A.

faqs.answer: A:    Assumption College offers Degree courses including 17 UG and 7 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Assumption College has specializations such as M.Sc. specializations in Textile Management, Food & Nutrition, B.A. specializations in English, B.Sc. specializations in Mathematics, Computer Science, Physics, Chemistry, Botany, M.A. specializations in English.
faqs.question: What kind of specializations are available in courses offered at Assumption College?

reviews_list.review_title: This is the best college for the B.Sc. in Physics course.

review_content.Placements: More than 96% of students got placed every year from our college. The highest salary offered by companies in India was 15 LPA, while the minimum salary offered was 3 LPA to 5 LPA. The recruitment companies for our college included Microsoft, ISRO, IBM, etc. Top roles offered were Research Scientist, Aerospace Engineer, etc. About 90% of students got their internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available to us. Despite not being a hotel manager, the hotel had fantastic meals. I believed that life was excellent and that we had a nice hotel with stringent rules. Free Wi-Fi was available to all faculty and students on campus. Additionally, we had a computer studio, a VFX studio, and a radio studio. A state-of-the-art library with computer access was available in the Chemistry lab.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the best college for the B.Sc. in Physics course.

review_content.Placements: About 77% of students were placed in my class. The highest package is 3.5 LPA, the lowest package is 1.2 LPA, and the average is 2 LPA. Companies like NASA, ISRO, Tesla, etc., are top recruiters. Top roles offered are aeronautical engineer, data analyst, etc. 70% of students got internship opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are Wi-Fi facilities throughout the college in every department, and also in every other area. There are labs for all lab-related subjects like physics, chemistry, computers, etc. There are food and science labs. There are 5 hotels, namely Dudley, Zumbro, Wallace, Washburn, and Noyes Garden. They are very comfortable for students to stay in.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Food Service Management and Dietetics - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, best college for M.Sc. in food service management and dietetics course.

review_content.Placements: Almost 93% of students got placements from this course. So the percentage is reasonable. Top recruiters are Cipla, Herbalife, HealthKart, etc. The highest salary is 22 LPA, and the minimum salary is 3 LPA. The average salary is 13 LPA. Top roles offered are nutrition educator, nutrition consultant, etc. 90% of students get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are offices, restaurants, well-designed classrooms, botanical garden, lawns, and libraries. The college buildings are well-organized and industrial. The food quality is very good and healthy. Restaurant hygiene and sanitation conditions are followed. For girls, there is a bathroom in case of emergency. They play sports and games like cricket, football, and so on.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, satisfactory experience.

review_content.Placements: Top roles that are offered are financial analyst, sales executive, management trainee, and educator. The rate of students getting placed is around 60%. The highest package offered is above 6 LPA. Recruiters are banks and few educational institutes.
review_content.Infrastructure: College area is very well-maintained and provides facilities including classrooms, a library stocked with books, Wi-Fi access around the area, and a medical facility. Hostel accommodation facilities are quite nice and have common space and sports facilities.

reviews_list.review_title: Great learning atmosphere.

review_content.Placements: The placement opportunities are limited and the rate of students placed is around 50%. Roles offered include financial analyst and management trainee. Internship opportunities are limited to around 30% of the batch. The highest package offered is 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel accommodation facilities are quite good and food is also manageable in terms of taste and full hygiene is maintained. Medical and sports facilities are available. Classrooms and libraries are big and provide a vast collection of books, journals, and online resources.

reviews_list.review_title: Loved the opportunity and learning.

review_content.Placements: Top roles offered include financial analyst, junior accountant, and research assistant. Recruiters include local financial firms and a few regional banks. The highest package offered is for 6 LPA. The average package is around 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department has adequate infrastructure and provides Wi-Fi access both in the department and hostel area. We have computer labs and financial software to practice and learn. The food quality and taste are average in mess. Medical facilities and sports facilities are available in the college.

admission_overview.college_name: Assumption College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Assumption College admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for certain entrance exams to take admission. The college offers a variety of courses to the candidates at the UG and PG level in the field of Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Humanities and Social Sciences and Science. Read below for more details on Assumption College admission process:

reviews.review_heading: Loved the opportunity and learning.

The food quality and taste are average in mess. Medical facilities and sports facilities are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements provided.
reviews.review_text: Hostel accommodation is good and there is recreation space also available with mess food in canteen of decent quality along with maintaining hygienic. Classrooms are lighted and we have labs and a library is also present in the course area. Medical help is limited.

reviews.review_heading: Our college doesn't provide good placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are almost the same as any other residential college in our country. We have nothing unique, however, we do have a better medical facility which is 24/7. The food quality in the mess and the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college crowd is really good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. The facilities are particular for our course. We have a big library and also AC classrooms. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is also good. The food quality of the mess is amazing.

reviews.review_heading: The placements at this college are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are really good. We have access to Wi-Fi 24X7 and also the college provides us with medical facilities. The food that is served to us is really good both in the canteen and also in mess making it a good experience.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are really good. We have all the facilities available for us in the hostel. The quality of the food being given to us in the mess and canteen is also really good. We also have medical facilities available for us.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I am very satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and the infrastructure of the college are really good. The management of the college provides us with Wi-Fi access, a library, and labs where we can have good study time. The food quality in the mess and in the canteen is also really good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for us are a hostel, Wi-Fi, AC classrooms, and a big library. The quality of the facilities is available in our hostel. All facilities are available on the campus. The food quality served in the mess and the canteen is really good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and the infrastructure of the course are great. We have all facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and also a big library. The quality of the facilities provided to us in the hostel is great. Great food is served in the canteen and in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: The placements of the college are great.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure of the college are great as we have access to almost all the great facilities in the college. The hostel has a great infrastructure. The food quality in the canteen is good but not in a mess at all. We have 24/7 medical assistance.

reviews_list.review_title: I am extremely happy with this college.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of students get placements. The highest salary package offered is 8.50 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.50 LPA.  The average salary package offered is 5.0 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Swati Menthol and Teleperformance.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. Wi-Fi was good. There were well-equipped labs for all courses. All classrooms were well-designed, and the library was the best place in our college. The hostel facility was not up to the mark.

reviews_list.review_title: I would advise student to take admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: There are around 200 students in our course. There are many companies visiting our college and provided the best jobs. The package offered was between Rs 10000-30000 per month. Many companies come like Swati menthol, Neeru menthol, bislery and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many games are available in college. Canteen facilities are also available. Very good food is available in the canteen. If anything happens, he is taken to the medical department. Students play here and go to very good places and show their good performance there.

reviews_list.review_title: If you want to succeed in your life, I suggest you not to join in this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements were not provided by our college. Our college doesn't focus on education much, and students just study here for time pass. Our college does not have any good faculty members, and there were also no staff members for management.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college just focuses on collecting your fees and does not provide any facility. Wi-Fi facility is provided only for staff members and not for students. It is the worst college I have ever seen.
review_content.Faculty: There were M.Sc graduated teachers in our college to teach students. They just do time pass and don't teach, so students didn't get jobs anywhere and failed in exams.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to succeed in your life, I suggest you not to join in this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college just focuses on collecting your fees and does not provide any facility. Wi-Fi facility is provided only for staff members and not for students. It is the worst college I have ever seen.

paragraphs: Admissions are currently open for all theAMET University Powered by Emversitycourses. Candidates are required to fulfil both eligibility and selection requirements to get admission. Interested candidates can check below the detailed steps to get a seat in the university:
Application Process 2026

Candidates seeking admission to AMET University Powered by Emversity need to fill out the application form. Aspirants need to pay an application fee ofINR 1000- INR 1500for admission. Candidates should also attach the relevant documents.
Selection Process

AMET University Powered by Emversity selects candidates for admission based on their score in the last qualifying exam. The university also evaluates the application form of the candidates to confirm eligibility.
Admission Confirmation

The university informs the candidates about their selection. Shortlisted aspirants need to report at the campus for document verification. Further, candidates also need to pay the enrollment fee of INR 30,000 andAMET Chennai feeof first semester to confirm their seat.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sri Sukhmani Group of Institutions is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Sc. and MCA. The fee structure for the Sri Sukhmani Group of Institutions programmes is around INR 93,000 to 6,60,000.

review_content.Placements: Every year, more than 100 students join our college. Excellent placements are provided in the army camp, BFHUS University, and many more. Top 10 students get direct entry into army camps as doctor's while the next 20 top students are given the privilege to serve the university and different institutions and hospitals joined with them.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24X7 on the campus including hostels. Classrooms and library are fully air-conditioned and have the latest technology of teaching. Professors are very supportive and understanding. Being near to highway we have an emergency multi-specialist hospital running 24X7.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: This is a good dental college as far as education is concerned .

review_content.Placements: There is as such no placement option given to students from college campus . You yourself to struggle . In most of dental college is as such provision of placement . Aur if by an chance they themselves keep you in their own college pay is too less to be taken.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infra is good , well managed , latest in their region but not best ,if you check all dental college near by its condition is well maintained but again not the best but better option in comparision to others that what I would like to say . Proper dental chairs ,xrays ,labs etcc

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are good and make students good for practical work.

review_content.Placements: All students did well in their internship, and it makes them quite well in clinical works. Placements totally depend on our own interest. Our college helps us to manage with theory as well as practical part. Some students are also given placement in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lecture theatres are fully air-conditioned, and the library has quite good books. Practical labs are well-furnished. Hostels are provided with Wi-Fi, and basketball and badminton courts are well-managed. Every year our college organises annual function and sports meet.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Sukhmani Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: One of the best college in the region with the lowest fee structure and best infrastructure.

content.Placements: Various healthcare companies visit college campus for job recruitment, after completion of the course you become eligible for opening your own clinic that you don't have to depend on anyone for recruitment. Various Pharmacovigilance companies also carries out placement drives.
content.Infrastructure: Fully Wi-Fi campus, Digital lecture theatre, One central Library along with it each department have their own departmental library, One general Hospital, one canteen, basketball court, playgrounds, seperate hostels for boys and girls, safe for girls as warden take care of them personally.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with placements, infrastructure, faculty members, and peace on the campus.

content.Placements: Every year, more than 100 students join our college. Excellent placements are provided in the army camp, BFHUS University, and many more. Top 10 students get direct entry into army camps as doctor's while the next 20 top students are given the privilege to serve the university and different institutions and hospitals joined with them.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24X7 on the campus including hostels. Classrooms and library are fully air-conditioned and have the latest technology of teaching. Professors are very supportive and understanding. Being near to highway we have an emergency multi-specialist hospital running 24X7.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This is a good dental college as far as education is concerned .

content.Placements: There is as such no placement option given to students from college campus . You yourself to struggle . In most of dental college is as such provision of placement . Aur if by an chance they themselves keep you in their own college pay is too less to be taken.
content.Infrastructure: Infra is good , well managed , latest in their region but not best ,if you check all dental college near by its condition is well maintained but again not the best but better option in comparision to others that what I would like to say . Proper dental chairs ,xrays ,labs etcc

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are good and make students good for practical work.

content.Placements: All students did well in their internship, and it makes them quite well in clinical works. Placements totally depend on our own interest. Our college helps us to manage with theory as well as practical part. Some students are also given placement in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Lecture theatres are fully air-conditioned, and the library has quite good books. Practical labs are well-furnished. Hostels are provided with Wi-Fi, and basketball and badminton courts are well-managed. Every year our college organises annual function and sports meet.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The placements are not a matter of concern in this course, the expertise in work is more important.

content.Placements: Can't say much about placements. The placements are not a matter of concern in this course, the expertise in work is more important.
content.Infrastructure: It has AC classrooms, a library with Wi-Fi. Labs are in fair condition. Canteen is a little bit expensive but overall good. Food is just normal. There is a basketball court in a very bad condition and just one volleyball net. It hot summer days it is very difficult to work in departments.
content.Faculty: The teachers are helpful. They teach using slides. Some teachers just play slides when in a hurry. Others teach with patience. But in the end, it is really haphazard. It's a college so, you are not spoon fed like school. The course is curriculum relevant. It's a dental college with average-sized OPD. The no. of patients are relatively less. Sometimes you have to find your own patients for your assignment.

Major specialisation at Shree Dev Bhoomi Institute of Education, Science and Technology are Quality Assurance, Pharmaceutical, Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Agriculture, General Nursing & Midwifery.

faqs.answer: A:    Shree Dev Bhoomi Institute of Education, Science and Technology provides programmes including M.Ed, B.Ed, B.Pharma, M.Pharma, Pharm.D, UG Diploma, After 10th Diploma, D.Pharma, B.Sc, BBA, BCA, GNM in streams such as Teaching & Education, Medicine & Health Sciences, Hospitality & Travel, Engineering, Nursing, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Science, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Quality Assurance, Pharmaceutical, Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Agriculture, General Nursing & Midwifery.

reviews_list.review_title: My medical journey starts here.

review_content.Placements: About 80-90% of students get placed here for a Bachelor of Pharmacy. The highest package offered is 35 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. More than 90% of students get internship opportunities. The top companies include Divis Laboratories, Cipla, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, and Lupin.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good, including Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well-organized, and libraries are also available with strong Wi-Fi connections. The food quality in the mess is awesome compared to various other private universities, but here you get only vegetarian food.

reviews_list.review_title: Started from Shree Dev Bhoomi.

review_content.Placements: About 80-90% of students get placed here for B.Pharma. The highest package offered here is 25 LPA. The lowest salary is 3 LPA, and average package is 5 LPA. More than 90% of students get internship opportunities. Top roles offered here in B.Pharma.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good like Wi-Fi facilities, classroom is well organised, even libraries are available with strong Wi-Fi connections. Food quality in mess is awesome as compared to various other private universities. But here you will get only vegetarian food.

content.Placements: About 70-80% of students got placed here for B.Pharma. The highest package offered here is 25 lakhs per annum, the lowest is 3 lakhs, and the average package is 5 lakhs per annum. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sachchidananda Sinha College, Magadh University offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. Sachchidananda Sinha College, Magadh University courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Sachchidananda Sinha College, Magadh University courses stands around INR 66,280 to 2,59,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Sachchidananda Sinha College, Magadh University provides programmes including M.Com, M.Sc, M.A, MCA, B.Ed, B.Lib.I.Sc, MBA/PGDM, B.A, B.Com, B.Sc, BBM/BMS, BCA, B.Pharma in streams such as Accounting & Commerce, Science, Humanities & Social Sciences, IT & Software, Teaching & Education, Business & Management Studies, Mass Communication & Media, Medicine & Health Sciences, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Chemistry, Physics, Zoology, Mathematics, Botany, English, Hindi, Biotechnology.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good and valuable college.

review_content.Placements: There are 250 students in our class. The main role offered to the students of our course is accounting. review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities in our college, like Wi-Fi over classrooms, RO purified water, and the cooling system is very good. I think these are the average facilities of any college.

reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure and placements are good enough. Last year, the salary package was 10 LPA.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students are placed in our course. Not just to get placed but also to gain deep knowledge about animals and humans and to make a perfect suitable career. The lowest salary package offered was 4 LPA, the average salary package offered was 7 LPA, and the maximum salary package offered was 12 LPA as per the previous year's data.

All libraries are well-maintained and have Wi-Fi and computers.

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

individual_reviews.title: The placement, structure, and facilities of the college are all good, making it a favorable choice.

content.Placements: Over 30 percent of students in my course secured placements. The highest package offered is 1.5 LPA, while the lowest is 75,000 per year. Currently, no top companies are recruiting here. About 40 percent of students secured internships through their own efforts in companies like Wipro, Infosys, etc. Yes.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good study material, faculty members, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities. The hostel rooms are spacious, clean, and well-maintained. However, there is currently no mess or canteen, and the facilities for games are also inadequate.

individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and facilities are good, and I agree that the college is very good.

content.Placements: There are placements, but students don't join the companies. I don't know about the highest package offered, but the package offered was 3.6 LPA. Most of the IT companies come for BCA, MCA, computer science engineering, and B.Com students with good results.

individual_reviews.title: It is a very good and valuable college.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. All facilities are well-maintained and well-furnished. All facilities are provided in this college. review_summary.college_name: Ishan Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Greater Noida.

content.Placements: Above 75% of students get placements. The highest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Companies like Sun Pharma, Mankind, etc., visit the college for placements. Approximately 75% of students get internships. Our college provides very good placements all over Greater Noida.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-maintained here. The library environment is peaceful. The entire campus has a Wi-Fi facility. The medical college facilities provided by the college are outstanding. Our college runs an Ayurveda hospital, so the doctor is easily approachable.

individual_reviews.title: Ishan institute of pharmacy.

content.Placements: For the D.Pharma course, there is no such placement or package. You can earn money by working as a pharmacist. The top roles offered could be clinical pharmacist, hospital pharmacist, or assistant professor. Also, the internship is not provided by the college; instead, students are allotted by the government. Hospital for practice.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty present are all B.Pharma or M.Pharma qualified. All facilities, such as practical labs, a library, and a mess, are available. The quality of the hostel and mess is 3/5, medical facilities are available for D.Pharma and B.Pharma pursuing students, and sports competitions are also conducted annually.

individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent campus with a positive environment.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are very good. Most of the students get placements from the campus. Reputed pharma companies hire students from our college. The guidance provided by the teachers plays a key role in placements. The salary package grabbed by students is quite fair.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well maintained here. The library environment is peaceful. The entire campus has a Wi-Fi facility, and the medical facilities provided by the college are outstanding. Our college runs an ayurvedic hospital, so the doctors are easily approachable. The campus is lush green and beautiful.

individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The top pharmaceutical companies like Ranbaxy and Cipla provide placements to our college students. The packages received by the students are good. The teachers helped me a lot to secure a job. The mock interviews conducted by the college is really helpful.
content.Infrastructure: There are smart classes in our college. The faculty members used to give lectures using powerpoint presentations. Sports and cultural fests are organised every year. I participate in them. My experience is awesome in the college. I won a medal in the sports event called Spardha.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best place to get a quality education.

content.Placements: The placement cell in our college is good. There was no shortage of the companies at the time of placements. Almost every year placement record was 100%. All the students get placed with a good salary package in very renowned companies. The average salary package offered ranges between 3-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of our college is good. There are huge lush green parks and grounds. Labs are very well-maintained. Classrooms are properly ventilated, and the cleanliness is highly maintained. The proper sports ground is available for every type of sports activity.

review_content.Placements: I have a paramedical department and all the seats in it are full. Paramedical has the same package as the entire college; there are other departments in my college too and their packages are different. Our college internship is also good, it has not been announced yet because it will be late for our batch since the admission is for 2024, and in other departments, 99% students go on internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels in our college are also good. My classmates who come from outside also stay in hostels. The hostels are very good and big. The library facility is also good, we get the books of our department. Labs have different shifts for different departments, all are systematic. A games room is also available in college. In between the classes, we get a break and use a gunny bag to go to the games room.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is full of disasters.

review_content.Placements: There are zero placements by the college. All boys and girls get placements by the Indian government every year. Students go to Jaipur after the 4th year, and get coaching for competition exams, then they are selected by a government scheme and not by college placement week. Students join local hospitals on their own initiative.
review_content.Infrastructure: Buildings are good, but sports items are missing. Labs are not available. Classrooms condition is good. The library is available, but it is like a showpiece. Medical duties run properly, but it does not have its own hospital. It cuts students' marks when they ask for rights and utilities. Our college cannot arrange proper items for a sports week. The transport service is poor.

admission_process.title: STECH Group of Education Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: STECH Group of Education admissionsare completely based on merit. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at STECH Group of Education is as follows:
Application Process

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants can fill out the enquiry form at the official website, https://stechbhl.in. Candidates have to fill up all the details carefully, such as name, mobile number, name of the state, etc. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
The institute admits students based on merit as per their last educational qualification. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSTECH Group of Education feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Centre for Distance and Virtual Learning, University of Hyderabad Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Centre for Distance and Virtual Learning, University of Hyderabad.

review_content.Placements: About 5% of students are paced in our course. The Minimum Salary offered was Rs. 50,000 per month and the maximum salary offered was Rs.1 lac per month. In the department of anthropology companies like ISO, Wipro offered placements. About10% of Students got internships. Students got jobs in MNC companies like Wipro and Infosys. University moulds students a good way to compete in the modern world.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has very good furnished classrooms. Food is healthy and hygienic, and library facility is good. It has very good furnished sports block. Students from all parts of the country study here. All types of games and sports facilities are available. Gym facility is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinue (Feb -25) Diploma in Telecom Technology & Management (DTTM) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I feel lucky to study in this college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of the students got placed in MNCs and startup companies from our college. In our course, the highest salary package offered ranges from 6LPA-10 LPA. Almost top MNCs like Wipro, TCS, Wave Rock, Google, Facebook, etc., visit our college for placements. Students are also offered a salary package of 3 LPA-5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library and all facilities. A hostel is also available. There are thousands of books in our library through which students can gain much knowledge. Food served in the hostel and college is tasty and is like food prepared at home.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Business Management (DBM) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Good college for research, education and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% get placed. The highest and the lowest packages were 9 lakh and 3 lacs. Recruiting companies are tcs, wipro etc. Mostly everyone gets internship in top companies, internship will not be provided in college. Average package offered to our course is 5 lakhs. Students have to search for their internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided are good like Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms. Library is one of the biggest where we can get mostly all books. Facilities in hostel are good. Food available in hostel and canteen is affordable and good. There are medical and sports facilities also.

review_summary.college_name: Centre for Distance and Virtual Learning, University of Hyderabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Project Management (DPM) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with the best infrastructure.

content.Placements: Every year almost 80% of the students get selected, but in this covid situation, 50 students got selected. Placement cell is very supportive, and they are trying to provide more jobs for the remaining student who didn't get selected. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are excellent. Hostel rooms are good and clean, and only 2 students can be allotted in a room with full freedom. There is a room with games and a newspaper room with almost 5 language papers. Remaining are excellent.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinue (Feb -25) Diploma in Telecom Technology & Management (DTTM) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Centre for Distance and Virtual Learning, University of Hyderabad.

content.Placements: About 5% of students are paced in our course. The Minimum Salary offered was Rs. 50,000 per month and the maximum salary offered was Rs.1 lac per month. In the department of anthropology companies like ISO, Wipro offered placements. About10% of Students got internships. Students got jobs in MNC companies like Wipro and Infosys. University moulds students a good way to compete in the modern world.
content.Infrastructure: The college has very good furnished classrooms. Food is healthy and hygienic, and library facility is good. It has very good furnished sports block. Students from all parts of the country study here. All types of games and sports facilities are available. Gym facility is also available.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinue (Feb -25) Diploma in Telecom Technology & Management (DTTM) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I feel lucky to study in this college.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of the students got placed in MNCs and startup companies from our college. In our course, the highest salary package offered ranges from 6LPA-10 LPA. Almost top MNCs like Wipro, TCS, Wave Rock, Google, Facebook, etc., visit our college for placements. Students are also offered a salary package of 3 LPA-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library and all facilities. A hostel is also available. There are thousands of books in our library through which students can gain much knowledge. Food served in the hostel and college is tasty and is like food prepared at home.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Business Management (DBM) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good college for research, education and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 60% get placed. The highest and the lowest packages were 9 lakh and 3 lacs. Recruiting companies are tcs, wipro etc. Mostly everyone gets internship in top companies, internship will not be provided in college. Average package offered to our course is 5 lakhs. Students have to search for their internship.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided are good like Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms. Library is one of the biggest where we can get mostly all books. Facilities in hostel are good. Food available in hostel and canteen is affordable and good. There are medical and sports facilities also.

highlights.summary:
What's new at Rajasthan University of Health Sciences (RUHS)? Admission is open to all courses for the academic year 2023. Interested candidates can apply by visiting the official college website.

Rajasthan University of Health Sciences is one of the prestigious universities located in Jaipur. It was established under the Act of State Government, The Rajasthan University of Health Sciences Act, 2005" (Act No. 1 of 2005)" on 2005. The University is approved by UGC and offers courses in various streams such as Medical, Dental, Nursing, Pharmacy, and Paramedical Science at UG, PG, and PhD level through its affiliated colleges. Admission to the University is granted on the basis of an entrance exam conducted at the national level or University level.

table.details: - Albert Einstein College of Medicine, Bronx, New York, USA (20th November 2012) - University of Alabama (UAB), Birmingham (27th November 2012) - Indian Oil Corporation Ltd., Mumbai (11 September 2013)

faqs.question: Does Jaipur National University offer better placements than RUHS - Rajasthan University of Health Sciences?

faqs.answer: A:    Rajasthan University of Health Sciences BSc fee structure is cumulative of various components, such as tuition fees, caution money, etc. The fee can vary based on the selected programme. RUHS Jaipur BSc tuition fees range from INR 63,000 to INR 12.8 lakh. Candidates who get selected have to pay the fees to confirm their seats. A candidate must have completed the age of 17 years but not completed 28 years in case of females and 25 years in case of males on or before December 31 of the admission year.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Sc Nursing at RUHS?

Des, M.Pharma Which Obtaining higher course fees than Rajasthan University By Jaipur National University. * Although being a Pvt university Jaipur National University Claiming hihgher course fees for their Courses.

reviews_list.review_title: Our university is good for the B.Pharma course.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 30- 35 percent of students get placement, and the highest package offered is 7 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3.5 LPA. The percentage between 65-75 got internships in different companies in the pharmaceutical industry, like Sun Pharma and IUPAC Laboratory.
review_content.Infrastructure: We get free high-speed Wi-Fi. We get near and clean washrooms, good atmospheric classrooms, and friendly classmates. There is a library for our course where we get all our study material and get a peaceful environment. There are also common boys' rooms and girls' common rooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: RUHS offers solid MBBS training with scope for better infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: RUHS MBBS has no campus placements. All students complete mandatory internships. Most graduates pursue PG or join hospitals as junior doctors. Package-based placement data does not apply to MBBS. Here, I notice that the package is not the criterion for MBBS students.
review_content.Infrastructure: RUHS MBBS colleges offer Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, equipped labs, and a good library. Hostels are basic but decent; mess food is average. Medical care is easily accessible through the attached hospital. Sports and indoor game facilities are available here.

review_summary.college_name: RUHS Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best college in Rajasthan because of placement, facilities, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent. About 35% students in every batch are selected into their further branch for upcoming studies. There are no packages in medical studies. Here, we considered a seat in postgraduate colleges as placement. Overall, this college is best for upcoming studies and placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college was opened in 1992, and since its opening, every batch has done well in studies in their era due to the college's best infrastructure for the MBBS course. There are different labs in every department. Labs are in good condition. There is a central library, where students come and study quietly.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Radiation Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: You had to prepare for exams, cleared them, and felt the knowledge hub of Medical Science in Jaipur.

content.Placements: Placements for our course were satisfactory and gradually improved every year. A good percentage of students from my batch got placed through college support as well as through off-campus opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: It looked amazing. There was a good campus, Wi-Fi, cameras, RO water, clean washrooms, library, etc. We had sports facilities like a football ground, table tennis ground, swimming pool, badminton court, and basketball court. The environment was good, and one of the best things was the canteen.
content.Faculty: Talking about the faculty, all were highly educated in their own field, and their behaviour and the way they tried to understand students’ behaviour and bonding were really good. In my course, we got knowledge about CT scan, X-ray, and MRI. These were very harmful rays, so we were more protective. Top-notch professors and practical studying with lots of patients were a good experience.

individual_reviews.title: Our university is good for the B.Pharma course.

content.Placements: Approximately 30- 35 percent of students get placement, and the highest package offered is 7 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3.5 LPA. The percentage between 65-75 got internships in different companies in the pharmaceutical industry, like Sun Pharma and IUPAC Laboratory.
content.Infrastructure: We get free high-speed Wi-Fi. We get near and clean washrooms, good atmospheric classrooms, and friendly classmates. There is a library for our course where we get all our study material and get a peaceful environment. There are also common boys' rooms and girls' common rooms.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: RUHS offers solid MBBS training with scope for better infrastructure.

content.Placements: RUHS MBBS has no campus placements. All students complete mandatory internships. Most graduates pursue PG or join hospitals as junior doctors. Package-based placement data does not apply to MBBS. Here, I notice that the package is not the criterion for MBBS students.
content.Infrastructure: RUHS MBBS colleges offer Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, equipped labs, and a good library. Hostels are basic but decent; mess food is average. Medical care is easily accessible through the attached hospital. Sports and indoor game facilities are available here.

individual_reviews.title: A short headline that summarizes this college absolutely because of the faculty and good placement.

content.Placements: In our batch, 70 to 75 percent of students are placed successfully. The highest package offered is around 10 LPA while the lowest is about 3 LPA. The average package stood close to 5 to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies included TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, and some core companies, depending on the branch. Around 60% of students also got internship opportunities in reputed firms, which helped in building practical exposure. The top roles offered were software engineer, data analyst, business associate, and some core technical roles. Overall, placement support was good, and the training sessions conducted by the placement cell really helped us prepare.

admission_overview.college_name: RUHS Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: RUHS admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The university considers scores in NEET, NEET SS, etc. for admission to specific courses.RUHS Jaipuroffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Medicine, Physiotherapy, Pharmacy, Nursing, Dentistry, etc. Interested candidates can apply on the official website of the university or exam conducting body depending on the chosen course.
RUHS Jaipur offers courses in full-time mode. The university offers 19 courses across various streams. Below are the key highlights forRUHS admissions:
Particulars
RUHS Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
UG courses:INR 63,000 - INR 13.4 lakh
PG courses:INR 18,100 - INR 19.5 lakh
How to apply?
https://ruhsraj.org/ or exam-conducting body
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

RUHS Jaipur offers admission to candidates based on their entrance exam scores. Besides, aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility requirements for admission to any offered courses. Below are popularRUHS coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

The total fee for RUHS courses is the sum of various components such as hostel fees, tuition fees, etc. Aspirants need to pay a refundable caution deposit one-time only at the time of admission. The fee of RUHS is affordable compared to private medical colleges or universities. Below is theRUHS feeand average package for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The seat intake varies course-wise RUHS. The university offers seats in most of the courses based on entrance exam scores. The availability of seats is one of the determining factors for admission to RUHS. The reservation of seats will be made subject to statutory provisions of Govt. of Rajasthan for Rajasthan domicile candidates. Candidates belonging to reservation categories of states other than Rajasthan shall be allotted seats in the un-reserved category. Below is the RUHS seat intake for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates are offered admission based on their entrance-exam score or merit in the qualifying exam. The university opens admissions online for eligible candidates. Below are the steps to get a seat in RUHS:
Step 1: RUHS Application Process 2025

Candidates applying for MBBS and BDS have to apply for NEET. For MD, MS, aspirants have to fill out the NEET PG application form. The university releases application form online for other courses. Aspirants have to pay an application fee to register for a course. The application fee for most of the courses isINR 1,800 (INR 900for SC, ST, ST-STA category of Rajasthan state).
Step 2: Selection

The university conducts admission test for most of the courses such as BPT, BSc, BPharm, etc. RUHS also accepts NEET, NEET MDS, NEET-PG, GPAT, NEET-SS for admission to specific programme. Once the entrance-exams results are out, candidates can apply for counselling.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

For courses accepting NEET scores, aspirants need to apply for Rajasthan NEET Counselling. For all other programmes, candidates need to participate in university counselling. Selected aspirants have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
Check out the following video on RUHS Jaipur admission, courses, and more:

faqs.question: What is the fees for BSc at RUHS Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Rajasthan University of Health Sciences BSc fee structureis cumulative of various components, such as tuition fees, caution money, etc. The fee can vary based on the selected programme. RUHS Jaipur BSc tuition fees range fromINR 63,000 to INR 12.8 lakh. Candidates who get selected have to pay the fees to confirm their seats. faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Sc Nursing at RUHS?
faqs.answer: There are more than5,000 seatsin BSc Nursing course at RUHS and its affiliated colleges. Out of the total intake, 85% of the total seats are filled up by the Bonafide candidates of Rajasthan, and 15% of the total seats are filled up by the candidates on all India basis inclusive of Rajasthan as per State Government guidelines. The percentage of female candidates shall not fall below 50% of the total seats in all categories.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Sc Nursing at RUHS?
faqs.answer: Aspirants need to pass Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, English and Biology with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for RUHS BSc Nursing programme. A candidate must have completed the age of 17 years but not completed 28 years in case of females and 25 years in case of males on or before December 31 of the admission year.

faqs.question: Is B.Sc available at RUHS?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rajasthan University of Health Sciences offers a three-year BSc Medical Lab Technology divided into six semesters. Additionally, the university also offers a four-year BSc Nursing programme at the UG level. Aspirants have to complete Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology to apply for the BSc MLT course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBBS at RUHS?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregate to apply for Rajasthan University of Health Sciences MBBS programme. There is a 5% relaxation in the aggregate for General PwD and 10% for reserved category candidates. Candidates must have attained the age of 17 years at the time of admission or will attain the sameby December 31of the admission year, or the last date of the year.

faqs.question: When will applications open for admission to B.Pharm at RUHS?
faqs.answer: Rajasthan University of Health Sciences usually opens application for BPharm in the last week of August. The application continues till third week of September. The mode of application is online. Candidates fulfiling the eligibility requirements can apply for BPharm on the university website.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in B.Pharm at RUHS?
faqs.answer: Rajasthan University of Health Sciences selects candidates for BPharm based on their score in admission test conducted by the university. The university conducts a computer-based admission test in Jaipur. The test includes 100 objective-type questions with 50 questions of Physics and 50 of Chemistry. The final selection is based on admission test and choice-filling by the candidate.

The total fee of BPharm is a sum of caution deposit, tuition, hostel fee, etc. Besides, candidates also need to pay a registration fee of INR 1,800 in the start to apply for BPharm.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BPharm at RUHS Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Candidates wanting to enrol in BPharm course of RUHS must fulfil its eligibility criteria. The aspirants who are Class 12 or equivalent exam pass withPhysics, Chemistry, English, Biology/ Mathematics can apply for admission. At the time of admission, candidates must hold the pass certificates (original and copies). These documents are required to verify that the candidate is eligible for the course admission.

faqs.question: Can I join RUHS - Rajasthan University of Health Sciences directly?
faqs.answer: Rajasthan University of Health Sciences does not offer direct admission. Candidates have to participate in selection rounds to get a seat in the university. RUHS conducts an admission test of 120 minutes for admission to various UG and PG courses such as BPT, BPharm, MSc, BSc, etc. The selection for courses such as BDS, MDS, MPharm, MBBS, etc. is based on national-level entrance-exam scores. The university accepts NEET-UG, NEET-PG, NEET MDS, GPAT and NEET SS for admission to specific programmes.

faqs.question: Are admissions at RUHS - Rajasthan University of Health Sciences entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Rajasthan University of Health Sciences admissions are primarily entrance-based. The university considers national-level entrance-exam scores for BDS, MDS, MBBS, MPharm, etc. RUHS conducts an admission test for shortlisting candidates for BPharm, BPT, BSc Nursing, and other programmes. The test is conducted for 120 minutes in English language. The papers includes objective-type questions related to the course.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for various courses at RUHS?
faqs.answer: Rajasthan University of Health Sciences offers seats to candidates based on their entrance-exam scores. The university accepts NEET-UG for admission to BDS and MBBS programme. RUHS also conducts an admission test to select candidates for courses other than accepting the national-level entrance-exams.Out of the total intake, the university reserves some seats subject to statutory provisions of Govt. of Rajasthan for Rajasthan domicile candidates. 5% seats are reserved on Merit-cum-Priority in each PwD category horizontally. Admission to the courses is open to all residents of India. However, preference shall be given to candidates of Rajasthan domicile.

faqs.question: What is the qualifying score required for admission to various courses at RUHS?
faqs.answer: RUHS considers Class 12 scores for UG and graduation for PG admission. Besides, aspirants must also pass the accepted entrance exam for admission. Below is the qualification required for top RUHS courses:CourseCommon EligibilityMBBSClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregateBPharmClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, English, Biology/ MathematicsBSc MLTClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry and BiologyBSc NursingClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, English and Biology with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)BPTClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, English and Biology with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)MPharmBPharm with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST)BDSClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregate

Colleges have libraries, sports grounds, clubs, Wi-Fi, and a campus. Hostel facility is good. There are different hostels for girls and boys with two or three sharing rooms, but the quality is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Rajasthani Institute of Paramedical SciencesReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure and rules are very good. I love this college more than other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. The hospital facility is nice. For every student, there is equipment, so there is no need for students to wait for their turn. There is a suitable time for practice for every student to learn greatly and genuinely.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Rajasthan Pharmacy CollegeReviewed on 31 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good in teaching.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good and all facilities are available like Wi Fi labs classrooms library and also the food facilities in the canteen. In the college mess canteen medical facilities and sports and games are also included.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Arya Group of CollegesReviewed on 27 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements and student life.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The computer labs are well-equipped with Wi-Fi connections. The classrooms are neat with comfortable benches. There are many books available in the library. The hostel facilities are good. The bedrooms are comfortable. The food is good, and the canteen is also available. The sports facilities are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Balaji College of PharmacyReviewed on 25 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good for Jaipur students, the infrastructure is good, and it is good for hostel studdents
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good for classrooms, and the hostel facility is also good. All the labs and classrooms are divided according to their subjects. The condition of all the classrooms is average, and there is no Wi-Fi facility. Library facilities are available where you can study, do your work, and read books. They provide library facilities free of cost for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Arya Group of CollegesReviewed on 14 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is really good and the best college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available here, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The living facilities here are good, the hostel is good, and the food is also good. The hostel wardens are good, and there is a 24/7 Wi-Fi facility. There is also equipment for sports.
